title: Thermal runaway confirmed in Virgin power bank fire
contentSnippet: In its final report into the incident on 21 July, which saw a fire break out in overhead bins on board flight VA1528 from Sydney to Hobart, the ATSB found that a power bank in a passenger’s backpack had failed and entered a dangerous “thermal runaway” state.

contentSnippet:

title: IT issue suspends flights at Edinburgh Airport
contentSnippet:
Flights in and out of Scotland’s busiest airport were suspended this morning after an IT issue affected Air Traffic Control. Air Traffic services at Edinburgh Airport (EDI/EGPH) are provided by ANSL not the UK’s main provider, NATS which is why disruption is limited to one airport. Several flights were due  [read more]
